title: kuruna debilis
intro: Kuruna debilis, also known as Kuruna debilis plant or Pausinystalia johimbe, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central Africa. The plant's bark contains a rich source of yohimbine, a naturally occurring alkaloid with medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an alpha-2 adrenergic receptor antagonist and a vasodilator. The health benefits of kuruna debilis are attributed to its potential to improve sexual function, enhance athletic performance, and even exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Kuruna debilis is traditionally prepared as a decoction or an extract, often used in herbal remedies to alleviate symptoms of erectile dysfunction and low libido.
